title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — EMEA — Q2 2026
summary: The EU operationalizes its regulatory infrastructure as AMLA launches Q3 with direct supervision authority while the MiCA review consultation (31 Aug deadline) determines DeFi and NFT treatment through 2027. Simultaneously, France enforces its 1 July PSAN transition cutoff, UK finalizes crypto authorization rules, and four Middle East jurisdictions complete licensing frameworks Q3-Q4. With 39 active policy events and 211 authorized CASPs navigating compliance, this quarter represents the densest
